character.bio: Ever training, this martial artist seeks true strength. Well-mannered and sincere, Ryu travels the globe in search of worthy opponents. Having overcome the Satsui no Hado, he now seeks yet greater heights.

ryu_st_mp.note: 2 frames of recovery added when the attack misses

ryu_st_hp.note: Forces the opponent into a standing position

ryu_st_hk.note: Forces a juggle state when hitting a mid-air opponentProduces a crumple stun for 36 frames when the attack lands as a Punish CounterJuggle state time is extended when attack hits a mid-air opponent as a Punish Counter

ryu_cr_mp.note: 2 frames of recovery added when the attack misses

ryu_cr_hp.note: Can only be canceled on the 1st active frame if the attack hitsForces the opponent into a standing position

ryu_cr_hk.note: Knockdown time extended when the attack lands as a Punish Counter, and changes to Hard Knockdown

ryu_j_mp.note: Forces a juggle state when hitting a mid-air opponent

ryu_j_hp.note: Forces a slam knockdown on counter or Punish Counter when hitting a mid-air opponent

ryu_collarbone_breaker.note: *Second attack becomes an overhead only if the first attack whiffs

ryu_short_uppercut.note: Can only be canceled on the 1st active frame if the attack hitsForces the opponent into a standing position

ryu_axe_kick.note: First attack forces the opponent into a standing positionSecond attack produces a ground bound on a mid-air hit

ryu_whirlwind_kick.note: * Can be canceled with an Aerial Tatsumaki Senpu-kyaku (Overdrive version included)

ryu_high_double_strike.note: *Can only be canceled into Denjin Charge on hit.Classic controls: ↓+Punch, Modern controls: ↓+Attack

ryu_fuwa_triple_strike_3.note: *Can only be canceled into Denjin Charge on hit.Classic controls: ↓+Punch, Modern controls: ↓+Attack

ryu_hadoken_l.context: (Effect changes when in Denjin Charge state)
ryu_hadoken_l.input: (Effect changes when in Denjin Charge state) ↓↘→ + LP

ryu_hadoken_m.context: (Effect changes when in Denjin Charge state)
ryu_hadoken_m.input: (Effect changes when in Denjin Charge state) ↓↘→ + MP

ryu_hadoken_h.context: (Effect changes when in Denjin Charge state)
ryu_hadoken_h.input: (Effect changes when in Denjin Charge state) ↓↘→ + HP

ryu_hadoken_od.context: (Effect changes when in Denjin Charge state)
ryu_hadoken_od.input: (Effect changes when in Denjin Charge state) ↓↘→ + P

ryu_shoryuken_l.note: Invincible against mid-air projectiles and strikes with mid-air hitboxes from frames 1 - 14Considered airborne from frames 7 - 34* After the 3rd active frame this move deals only 800 damage

ryu_shoryuken_m.note: Invincible against mid-air projectiles and strikes with mid-air hitboxes from frames 1 - 9Considered airborne from frames 8 - 44* After the 3rd active frame this move deals only 800 damage

ryu_shoryuken_h.note: Invincible against mid-air projectiles and strikes with mid-air hitboxes from frames 1 - 8.Considered airborne from frames 9 - 49.* After the 2nd active frame this move deals only 800 damage.

ryu_shoryuken_od.note: Completely invincible from frames 1 - 8.Considered airborne from frames 8 - 51.

ryu_high_blade_kick_h.note: Juggle state time is extended when attack lands as a Punish Counter.

ryu_hashogeki_l.context: (Effect changes when in Denjin Charge state)
ryu_hashogeki_l.input: (Effect changes when in Denjin Charge state) ↓↙← + LP
ryu_hashogeki_l.note: Forces a juggle state when the attack lands as a counter or Punish Counter.Clashes with projectiles (Once)

ryu_hashogeki_m.context: (Effect changes when in Denjin Charge state)
ryu_hashogeki_m.input: (Effect changes when in Denjin Charge state) ↓↙← + MP
ryu_hashogeki_m.note: Forces a juggle state when the attack lands as a counter or Punish Counter.Clashes with projectiles (Once)

ryu_hashogeki_h.context: (Effect changes when in Denjin Charge state)
ryu_hashogeki_h.input: (Effect changes when in Denjin Charge state) ↓↙← + HP

ryu_hashogeki_od.context: (Effect changes when in Denjin Charge state)
ryu_hashogeki_od.input: (Effect changes when in Denjin Charge state) ↓↙← + P

ryu_hashogeki_od_denjin.note: Produces a crumple stun for 39 frames when the attack lands.Clashes with projectiles (Once)

ryu_denjin_charge.note: Denjin Charge stock added on the 51st frame. Only 1 Denjin Charge stock can be held at a time.Hadoken, Hashogeki, Shinku Hadoken, and Shin Hashogeki's properties are enhanced when a Denjin Charge is held.

ryu_sa1.context: (Effect changes when in Denjin Charge state)
ryu_sa1.input: (Effect changes when in Denjin Charge state) ↓↘→↓↘→ + P
ryu_sa1.note: Invincible to strikes and throws from frame 1 to frame 8.Values do not change when the attack lands as a counter or Punish Counter.The minimum guaranteed damage is 30%.

ryu_sa1_denjin.note: Invincible to strikes and throws from frame 1 to frame 8.Values do not change when the attack lands as a counter or Punish Counter.The minimum guaranteed damage is 30%.

ryu_sa2_lv1.note: Completely invincible from frame 1 to frame 13.Hold down the button to change the properties of this move.Changes to Level 2 version if the button is held for more than 7 frames and then released.Changes to Level 3 version if the button is held for more than 39 frames and then released.Invincible to strikes and throws from frame 2 to frame 8.Values do not change when the attack lands as a counter or Punish Counter.The minimum guaranteed damage is 40%.

ryu_sa2_lv2.note: Completely invincible from frame 1 to frame 9.Hold down the button to change the properties of this move.Changes to Level 2 version if the button is held for more than 7 frames and then released.Changes to Level 3 version if the button is held for more than 39 frames and then released.Invincible to strikes and throws from frame 2 to frame 8.Values do not change when the attack lands as a counter or Punish Counter.The minimum guaranteed damage is 40%.

ryu_sa2_lv3.note: Completely invincible from frame 1 to frame 9.Hold down the button to change the properties of this move.Changes to Level 2 version if the button is held for more than 7 frames and then released.Changes to Level 3 version if the button is held for more than 39 frames and then released.Invincible to strikes and throws from frame 2 to frame 8.Values do not change when the attack lands as a counter or Punish Counter.The minimum guaranteed damage is 40%.

ryu_sa2_denjin_lv1.note: Completely invincible from frame 1 to frame 13.Hold down the button to change the properties of this move.Changes to Level 2 version if the button is held for more than 7 frames and then released.Changes to Level 3 version if the button is held for more than 39 frames and then released.Invincible to strikes and throws from frame 2 to frame 8.Values do not change when the attack lands as a counter or Punish Counter.The minimum guaranteed damage is 40%.

ryu_sa2_denjin_lv2.note: Completely invincible from frame 1 to frame 9.Hold down the button to change the properties of this move.Changes to Level 2 version if the button is held for more than 7 frames and then released.Changes to Level 3 version if the button is held for more than 39 frames and then released.Invincible to strikes and throws from frame 2 to frame 8.Values do not change when the attack lands as a counter or Punish Counter.The minimum guaranteed damage is 40%.

ryu_sa2_denjin_lv3.note: Completely invincible from frame 1 to frame 9.Hold down the button to change the properties of this move.Changes to Level 2 version if the button is held for more than 7 frames and then released.Changes to Level 3 version if the button is held for more than 39 frames and then released.Invincible to strikes and throws from frame 2 to frame 8.Values do not change when the attack lands as a counter or Punish Counter.The minimum guaranteed damage is 40%.

ryu_sa3.context: (More powerful when vitality is at 25% or below)
ryu_sa3.input: (More powerful when vitality is at 25% or below) ↓↘→↓↘→ + K
ryu_sa3.note: Completely invincible from frame 1 to frame 16.Values do not change when the attack lands as a counter or Punish Counter.The minimum guaranteed damage is 50%.* Can only be canceled into from special moves.

ryu_ca.context: (More powerful when vitality is at 25% or below)
ryu_ca.input: (More powerful when vitality is at 25% or below) ↓↘→↓↘→ + K
ryu_ca.note: Completely invincible from frame 1 to frame 16.Values do not change when the attack lands as a counter or Punish Counter.The minimum guaranteed damage is 50%.* Can only be canceled into from special moves.

ryu_throw_f.note: Properties change to the following when the attack lands as a Punish Counter:- Deals 2040 damage- Super Art gauge increases by 4000- Forces a hard knockdown

ryu_throw_b.note: Properties change to the following when the attack lands as a Punish Counter:- Deals 2040 damage- Super Art gauge increases by 4000- Forces a hard knockdown

ryu_back_dash.note: Invincible to throws from frame 1 to frame 15.

ryu_drive_impact.note: Super Armor for 2 hits from frames 1 - 27Produces a wall splat if the pushback on hit causes the opponent to connect with the stage wallProperties change to the following when the attack lands as a Punish Counter, or after the Super Armor absorbs a hit:- Produces a crumple stun if the opponent is standing on the ground- Forces a spinning knockdown when hitting a mid-air opponent- Super Art gauge increases by 3000

ryu_drive_reversal_block.level: (When blocking or during a successful Drive Parry)  HH
ryu_drive_reversal_block.context: (When blocking or during a successful Drive Parry)
ryu_drive_reversal_block.note: Recoverable damageCompletely invincible from frames 1 - 225 frames of recovery added on hit

ryu_drive_reversal_wakeup.note: Recoverable damageCompletely invincible on frames 1 - 205 frames of recovery added on hit

ryu_drive_parry.context: (Hold the button to extend the move's duration)
ryu_drive_parry.input: (Hold the button to extend the move's duration) MP + MK
ryu_drive_parry.note: *1 Can be canceled from the 4th frame via Drive Rush*2 Parry hitbox is extended for as long as the buttons are heldOnly blocks can be performed during the recovery periodAlways in Punish Counter state during execution.

ryu_perfect_parry_strike.note: Perfect Parry activates when an attack is absorbed on the frame a parry is input, or on the next frame. (For high and overhead attacks, the player must press the direction away from the opponent. For low attacks, down and back)If no direction is inputted the result will be a regular parry with an additional Drive increase of 3000.Fully invincible for 5 frames once recovery is over (invincibility not granted if you continue the parry)The player on the receiving end of a Perfect Parry cannot cancel and is forced into a Punish Counter state until their move is finished

ryu_perfect_parry_projectile.note: Perfect Parry activates when an attack is absorbed on the frame a parry is input, or on the next frameNo screen freeze occurs.The player on the receiving end of a Perfect Parry cannot cancel and is forced into a Punish Counter state until their move is finished

ryu_parry_drive_rush.note: Screen freeze occurs until the 10th frame* Can be canceled into an attack on the 9th frame of the move   Can be canceled into actions other than a parry from the 24th frame

ryu_cancel_drive_rush.level: (While connecting with a special-cancelable move)  (  )  MM
ryu_cancel_drive_rush.input: (While connecting with a special-cancelable move) →→ + /5/6MP + MK
ryu_cancel_drive_rush.note: Screen freeze occurs until the 9th frame* Can be canceled into an attack from the 10th frame of the move   Can be canceled into actions other than a parry from the 25th frame
